summary: Matched fn_8003F654 in src/melee/pl/plbonuslib.c, added a local inline my_sqrtf helper using __frsqrte refinement, removed an unused MSL/math_ppc.h include, and changed configure.py to link plbonuslib.c as Matching. PR body claims require-protos, ninja, fn_8003F654 100%, and plbonuslib.c .text/.data/.sdata2 100%; bot report confirms new matches for fn_8003F654 and .sdata2.

key_files.role: Matched fn_8003F654 and added my_sqrtf helper; removed MSL/math_ppc.h include to preserve .sdata2 layout.
evidence_refs: diff: plbonuslib.c include removal and my_sqrtf addition
pr_body: fn_8003F654 and plbonuslib.c section verification

key_files.role: Changed melee/pl/plbonuslib.c from NonMatching to Matching in MatchingFor configuration.

what_changed.text: configure.py now marks melee/pl/plbonuslib.c as Matching instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: diff: configure.py MatchingFor object status change

what_changed.text: src/melee/pl/plbonuslib.c removes #include <MSL/math_ppc.h> while keeping MSL/math.h and MetroTRK/intrinsics.h.
evidence_refs: pr_body: unused MSL/math_ppc.h include removed so generated .sdata2 layout matches target object

what_changed.text: Added static inline my_sqrtf(float x), using local const double half=0.5 and three=3.0, __frsqrte, three Newton-style refinement steps, and volatile float y before returning the computed sqrt-like value.
evidence_refs: pr_body: helper uses local double constants so function codegen matches without adding extra .sdata2 local statics

what_changed.text: Reworked fn_8003F654 around helper calls and local helper functions such as pl_Verify_gm_8016AEDC, pl_CheckIfSameTeam, and pl_CalculateAverage, replacing an inline gm_8016AEDC/team/average pattern in the old body.
PR body reports python configure.py --require-protos, ninja, fn_8003F654 100.0%, and plbonuslib.c .text/.data/.sdata2 all 100.0%; bot report records 2 new matches for fn_8003F654 and .sdata2.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01

smart_moves.text: Kept double constants local inside the inline sqrt helper instead of creating extra .sdata2 local statics, explicitly tying the tactic to codegen and section-layout matching.
evidence_refs: pr_body: local double constants avoid extra .sdata2 local statics
diff: const double half and three in my_sqrtf

smart_moves.text: Removed an unused include that affected generated .sdata2 layout rather than compensating with dummy data.
evidence_refs: pr_body: unused MSL/math_ppc.h include removed so .sdata2 layout matches

smart_moves.text: Only flipped plbonuslib.c to Matching after the PR recorded function-level and TU section-level verification.

decomp_lessons.text: For math helper reconstruction, section layout can depend on whether constants are local automatic const doubles versus emitted TU-local statics; verify both function codegen and .sdata2 before introducing named storage.
evidence_refs: pr_body: helper uses local double constants so function codegen matches without extra .sdata2 local statics
text_corpus: bot report .sdata2 moved from 83.33% to 100.00%

decomp_lessons.text: Unused includes can be data-layout relevant in this codebase; removing MSL/math_ppc.h was part of matching .sdata2 for plbonuslib.c.
evidence_refs: pr_body: unused include removal made generated .sdata2 layout match target object

decomp_lessons.text: Do not treat a source body as ready to link Matching from function score alone; this PR paired the function match with TU section checks for .text, .data, and .sdata2.

naming_conventions.text: This PR kept uncertain global/function names address-style, such as fn_8003F654, gm_8016AEDC-derived helper naming, and xDxx struct fields, while using local role names like table, entity, teammate_slot, teammate_table, other_pos, and cam_pos inside the matched function.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used a narrow static inline my_sqrtf wrapper around __frsqrte with three refinement steps to match sqrt-like codegen in fn_8003F654.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_8003F654 calls my_sqrtf for squared x/y distance

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used local const double half and three within my_sqrtf rather than named static constants, with PR body explicitly saying this avoided extra .sdata2 local statics.
evidence_refs: diff: const double half = 0.5 and three = 3.0
pr_body: local double constants so codegen matches without adding extra .sdata2 local statics

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Removed MSL/math_ppc.h to change generated .sdata2 layout; the PR says the include was unused and its removal made layout match.
evidence_refs: pr_body: unused MSL/math_ppc.h include removed so generated .sdata2 layout matches target object

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used local lifetime/register-shaping artifacts in the matched body, including volatile float y, u8 _[4], temporary new_var, prev_pos2, and explicit abs assignment branches; these are supported only as PR-local tactics by the reported match evidence.
evidence_refs: diff: my_sqrtf u8 _[4] and volatile float y

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local constants can avoid unwanted .sdata2 statics in math helpers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2568, my_sqrtf used local const double values for 0.5 and 3.0; the author states this matched function codegen without adding extra .sdata2 local statics, and the PR reports plbonuslib.c .sdata2 at 100.0%.
evidence_refs: pr_body: local double constants so codegen matches without extra .sdata2 local statics
diff: my_sqrtf local const double half/three

accepted_candidate_records.title: Include cleanup can be section-layout relevant
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2568, removing unused MSL/math_ppc.h from plbonuslib.c was part of matching the generated .sdata2 layout to the target object.
evidence_refs: pr_body: unused include removed so generated .sdata2 layout matches

source_update_candidates.title: Treat include changes as possible data-layout changes when verification shows section impact
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2568 is evidence that an unused include removal can affect generated .sdata2 layout. Consider adding guidance to inspect section output when include changes accompany a matching PR, especially where math headers or inline helpers may introduce constants.
evidence_refs: pr_body: unused MSL/math_ppc.h include removed so generated .sdata2 layout matches target object
source_update_candidates.reason: Current standards cover data/literal ownership and verification, but this PR may justify an explicit note that include cleanup can affect generated section layout.

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer local constants over named storage when section ownership is not needed and objdiff supports it
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2568 supports a narrow guideline: when reconstructing helper math code, local constants may be preferable to TU-local statics if they match codegen and avoid unwanted .sdata2 symbols. This should remain verification-led, not a blanket rule.
evidence_refs: pr_body: helper uses local double constants so function codegen matches without adding extra .sdata2 local statics
diff: my_sqrtf local const double half/three
source_update_candidates.reason: This is consistent with existing literals/data standards, but the curator may want a searchable example-specific note for math constants.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize volatile float y, u8 _[4], new_var, or explicit unary-plus abs branches as accepted style; the slice only supports them as local tactics used in a matched function.
Do not infer that my_sqrtf is a canonical project-wide sqrtf replacement; evidence only shows it was added static inline in plbonuslib.c for fn_8003F654 matching.
Do not infer review approval rationale beyond merge state and available bot/PR text; no review comments were loaded.
